feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >you can’t focus on whales it’s unsustainable This has been proven false time af…
entry.content: >you can’t focus on whales it’s unsustainable This has been proven false time after time. Catering to the wealthy is a viable strategy. Live entertainment like concerts and sports have learned this lesson well. UFC events are 500% more expensive than before and it’s been working. Even for video games, the whales will keep everything afloat. This is a new era, love it or leave it

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: It's more than fair to say that Uwe Boll is secretly one of the greatest auteurs…

entry.title: /b/ Random: Chronovisor
entry.content: Where can I find a real, working Chronovisor on the Dark Web? You know what they say, "you can find anything on the Dark Web, anything at all" so why not this as well? Because imagine how sick it would be to finally know what dinosaurs actually looked like, how ancient Greek Pankration actually moved like, what Chopin's own piano playing actually SOUNDED like and more? That's what I would like to find out if I had a Chronovisor. So where can I find one?

entry.title: /int/ International: average iq of turkey is 80
entry.content: average iq of turkey is 80

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Not on PC
entry.content: Not on PC

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Can I still enjoy GTA VI if I skip every cutscene?
entry.content: I skip stories in games if there is no gameplay to the story. So I didn't skip Baldur's Gate 3 or Starsector stories, because you would make choices in the story, which affected the story and the gameplay itself. It would affect what items you get, what encounters you face, etc. But no GTA game is like that, they're just movies played in the middle of gameplay that have zero impact on what happens. So I feel like I would just skip them all.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I want to share a story of how I used social engineering to make this girl my gi…
entry.content: I want to share a story of how I used social engineering to make this girl my girlfriend. For background - I am 38. She is 19. So in 2022, I left Russia because the war started as every male was freaking out about a general mobilization. Since I had served in the army before, I was considered a reservist and could have potentially been drafted. Since I know English, I got a job teaching English in Thailand. 3 years goes by and I can't really stay abroad anymore because of employment and visa iss

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8347 Keyboard Edition Previous Thread: >>83746485 F-list…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8347 Keyboard Edition Previous Thread: >>83746485 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles,

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1035
entry.content: /acrg/ - Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1035 BRAAAAAP-*CRASH* Edition Remember to SCREENCAP your links so we can laugh when they delete their posts. Talk about artists or commissioners, mostly the bad ones or those who got under your skin. Share your experiences and get angry with us. For all artists (and commissioners who are close friends with artists) here, beware of: Horu, Pixxy, OkiOppai, Timedwatcher, AnythingGoes, Skitterleaf, kathielnotfound (Jocelyn Jones), and Snoopcrow/jbunny/j6un9

Previous https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/82141044 All past /mspdt/ threads: https://desuarchive.org/trash/searc h/text/ms%20paint%20draw%20thread/t ype/op/page/1/ Artist resources courtesy of Anon: http://pastebin.com/Mu66aztE And a bonus one stolen from /vp/ with some download links: http

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Best License Plate
entry.content: Which state has the best default license plate? No special plates allowed. My vote for best is Colorado. Very simply two tone plate with a mountain backdrop in a nice shade of green. Not too complicated, no attempt at photorealism, no website banner, no stupid state logo My vote for the worst plate is tied between Wisconsin and New Mexico WI plate is old as fuck, hasn't been updated in 50 years. Looks very busy with clashing colors, and a small silhouette that hard to make out. Looks bad on ever

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: A 1p/3p Action Territory Control Games
entry.content: For long time, I’m searching for games that blend action-packed gameplay with territory/business control mechanics. The best way I can describe it is like games: - The Godfather 1&2: Action-heavy, but with a focus on taking over businesses and expanding your influence. - Middle-earth: Shadow of War: Conquering forts, recruiting followers, and managing your army, all while being a badass in combat. - Overlord 2: Conquering lands & building your empire. - GTA: San Andreas (gang wars): Taking over

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Electrical issue
entry.content: This has happened twice now, both at the same exact time 5:30 AM >enter car (electricity on) >press clutch >split second after starter button pressed all power shuts off. No lights, dash, nothing >wait 5 min >power comes back Now the first time it happened I got lucky and the car started after the 5 min. 2nd time it never came back Tested battery, 12.8v. Started car literally 4 hours earlier no problem Won’t even jump start. First time this happened, car was fine for literally a week, no problem

entry.title: /g/ Technology: When Americans choose Chinese AI
entry.content: >You do not need God (Anthropic/OpenAI) to write emails Americans are using Chinese models for the backbone of their business and Claude/GPT for complex planning and reviewing tasks. Through regulatory capture and first mover advantage, the frontier labs have already captured F500 firms. The real market for these models is in small to medium sized businesses. There is a place for everyone so long as the frontier labs focus on tasks that are too complex or unsolvable by weaker models. https://res

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The Vulkan API's descriptor heap extension allows for explicit management of des…
entry.content: The Vulkan API's descriptor heap extension allows for explicit management of descriptors and memory used to store descriptors (descriptor heaps). VK_EXT_descriptor_heap addresses issues uncovered with VK_EXT_descriptor_buffer and should provide more portable guarantees and more predictable performance characteristics.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: None of the scams I've tried with AI have gotten me any profit. A YouTuber sugge…
entry.content: None of the scams I've tried with AI have gotten me any profit. A YouTuber suggested spamming Amazon with AI books so I tried this for months, burning what I estimate to be $7k in tokens (I only paid for the monthly subscription though) to generate and refine hundreds of books. Guess how many I sold. Four. Guess what my royalties are. Seven dollars. I can't even tell you how many YouTube channels I've made and spammed with AI vids, only to get completely ignored. I've put AI comics on Webtoon, A

entry.title: /g/ Technology: MIDI
entry.content: >I would like to be able to control display graphics with hardware. I have some MIDI controllers that have pads, knobs, analog sticks and such, and I am looking for a way to incorporate these into my computer workflow. For instance, I have sensitive vision so I'm constantly fiddling with my display's color settings; adjusting brightness/gamma levels, adjusting r/g/b levels, using macros- nothing too fancy. But given my not-so-ergonomic mouse, I find it somewhat more enjoyable if I get to play wi

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The vast majority of successful artists are beautiful and/or sexy
entry.content: Like, why is there a constant Kpop thread active here? Is it to post soft core porn, or to celebrate the music? Why were boy bands so popular in the 90s? Was it because of their music or the way they looked? Why was ABBA so popular in the 70s? Because of great music or the blonde one? It's fascinating how people can never admit what a great role looks play in success. Sure there are ugly artists who have been successful, but they're few and far between. Music is as much about softcore porn as it

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Buying Sight Unseen From Dealership
entry.content: Has anyone ever done this before? I found a car I like online. It's in my price range. It's a somewhat rare car in a specific color that I like (which is hard to find). The only problem is that it is at a dealership about 450 miles away. I have driven an identical model in a test drive a couple of years ago, so I know that I like the actual car itself. I want to finance the car but if need be could buy cash (it is listed for about $10k). I think it is being listed for close to a fair price, and

entry.title: /o/ Auto: It's impossible to build a highly reliable car in 2026. Things like turbos, ultr…
entry.content: It's impossible to build a highly reliable car in 2026. Things like turbos, ultra-thin oil and CVTs have made cars incredibly efficient, but the downside is that they can't tolerate any abuse. For instance, tiny metal shavings that would've caused no issues in older engines now threaten to blow up millions of new ones. The problems will only get worse, and the result is that modern cars will be worth next to nothing in 20 years.
